en_title: Great New Games Are Getting Caught Up in the Online Backlash Against PlayStation Killing Discs
cn_title: 新游戏卷入PlayStation取消光盘抵制
subtitle: 无辜新作遭殃
opus_summary: 索尼宣布2028年起停止为新PlayStation游戏生产光盘后，抵制行动波及高分新作《Denshattack!》。分析师认为数字销售利润巨大，索尼不会撤回决定。

paragraphs.en: Ever since Sony announced plans to do away with physical discs for new PlayStation games from 2028 onwards, angry gamers have flooded the company’s social media platforms to demand a U-turn. This in turn has overshadowed PlayStation’s online activity — spare a thought for the people who found themselves bearing the brunt of the backlash just because they were in PlayStation’s first social media post since the disc-killing announcement .
paragraphs.cn: 自索尼宣布从2028年起取消新PlayStation游戏实体光盘后，愤怒玩家便涌入其社交平台要求撤回决定。这也盖过了PlayStation其他网络活动，甚至让宣布消息后首条社交帖中的无关人员承受了抵制怒火。

paragraphs.en: Now, great new games are getting caught in the crossfire. The digital-only Denshattack! , from indie developer Undercoders, launched yesterday, and PlayStation promoted the release across its social media channels. This is a game with rave reviews (IGN’s Denshattack! review returned a 9/10), and it deserves its moment in the sun. But unfortunately Sony’s decision to kill physical discs has cast a long shadow on all things PlayStation — and core gamers won’t let this one go.
paragraphs.cn: 如今，优秀新游戏也被卷入交火。独立开发商Undercoders的纯数字游戏《Denshattack!》昨日发售，PlayStation在社交渠道宣传了它。游戏口碑极佳，IGN给出9分，本应享受高光时刻；但索尼取消光盘的决定给所有PlayStation内容蒙上阴影，核心玩家拒绝就此罢休。

paragraphs.en: Some are using PlayStation’s Denshattack! 'out today on PS5' social media post as a jumping off point to call for people to boycott its release on Sony’s console, pushing for people to buy it elsewhere (it’s also out on PC, Nintendo Switch 2, and Xbox Series X and S).
paragraphs.cn: 有人借PlayStation发布的「今日登陆PS5」宣传帖呼吁抵制索尼主机版，要求玩家改在PC、Nintendo Switch 2或XBOX Series购买。

paragraphs.en: “DO NOT PLAY THIS ON PS5!” declared fighting game content creator Avataryaya in a QT viewed over 700,000 times . “It's also out today with a stellar PC port, and a locked 60 on Switch 2! Buy it elsewhere!” another said.
paragraphs.cn: 格斗游戏创作者Avataryaya在浏览量超过70万的转帖中喊道：「不要在PS5上玩！PC版移植非常出色，Nintendo Switch 2版也能锁定60帧！去别的平台买！」

paragraphs.en: “Genuine banger games are being released that are being buried/lambasted by your awful decision,” another said in a tweet viewed over 100,000 times . “Your silence is not just spitting in your fans faces, but now is ACTIVELY affecting the launch of a DIGITAL game :)! Will be buying this on Switch instead of PS.”
paragraphs.cn: 另一条浏览量超过10万的帖子称：「真正优秀的游戏正因你们糟糕的决定被埋没和痛骂。你们的沉默不仅是在羞辱粉丝，如今还在切实影响一款数字游戏的首发！我会买Switch版而不是PlayStation版。」

paragraphs.en: The many replies to PlayStation’s Denshattack! post are just as vociferous. “Stomp bosses is what everyone at PlayStation should have done when the attack on physical media and gaming culture was announced,” the Does it play? Twitter account, which is at the heart of the online backlash, replied . “This will have catastrophic consequences for the gaming industry and beyond. Short-term profit isn't worth it. Hope you realize before it's too late.”
paragraphs.cn: PlayStation宣传帖下的回复同样激烈。抵制行动核心账号Does it play?写道：「宣布攻击实体媒介和游戏文化时，PlayStation所有人都该去踩老板。这会给游戏业乃至更广领域造成灾难性后果。短期利润不值得，希望你们及时醒悟。」

paragraphs.en: Only Sony will know if the online backlash ends up affecting Denshattack! on PlayStation in commercial terms, and I imagine the developers at Undercoders will just want people to enjoy their game wherever they think best. But it’s hardly ideal to see Denshattack!’s PlayStation release caught up in the backlash simply because of unfortunate timing. With no Sony U-turn in sight, developers releasing new games on PlayStation will probably have to accept that they’ll likely see the same sort of reaction Denshattack! is getting, at least for the foreseeable future.
paragraphs.cn: 抵制是否会影响PlayStation版《Denshattack!》销量，只有索尼知道。Undercoders开发者大概只希望玩家在自己喜欢的平台享受游戏。新作仅因时机不佳就被卷入争议绝非理想状况。索尼没有撤回迹象，近期在PlayStation发售新作的开发者恐怕都得接受类似反应。

paragraphs.en: Inevitably, we come to the question that has been asked for weeks now: will Sony reverse its decision? Every analyst we’ve spoken to about this has said there’s no chance . Dr. Serkan Toto, CEO of Japanese game industry consultancy firm Kantan Games, suggested that even if half a million people cancelled their PlayStation Plus subscription in protest, it would be just a drop in the ocean for Sony — which is not going to change its mind.
paragraphs.cn: 问题最终仍是：索尼会撤回决定吗？接受采访的所有分析师都认为绝无可能。Kantan Games CEO Serkan Toto博士称，即便50万人取消PlayStation Plus，也只是索尼业务中的沧海一粟，不足以令其改弦更张。

paragraphs.en: "I sympathize with physical media fans, but Sony will not reverse this decision," Toto told IGN. "They of course knew what the online reaction would look like, and they now wait for this storm to pass.
paragraphs.cn: Toto告诉IGN：「我同情实体媒介爱好者，但索尼不会撤销这项决定。他们当然早已知道网络反应会是什么样子，现在只是在等这场风波过去。」

paragraphs.en: "Sony has over 120 million active PlayStation users," he continued. "Around 50 million people subscribe to PlayStation Plus. As a thought experiment, let's say 500,000 cancel in protest, that would be just 1% of that business gone — of course not enough for Sony to start rethinking. Digital is just too lucrative."
paragraphs.cn: 他继续说道：「索尼拥有超过1.2亿名PlayStation活跃用户，约有5,000万人订阅PlayStation Plus。假设有50万人为抗议而退订，那也只相当于这项业务流失1%，当然不足以让索尼重新考虑。数字业务实在太赚钱了。」

paragraphs.en: For Sony, going all-digital for new game releases will earn it more money from every sale at a time when console sales are expected to plummet due to their rising cost. For a first-party PlayStation game such as The Last of Us, Sony will only keep around 65% of the money from a physical copy, with around 30% going to the retailer and roughly another 5% on manufacturing costs. Meanwhile, for a physical copy of a third-party game such as the Activision-published Call of Duty, Sony will get a licensing fee, likely around 15%.
paragraphs.cn: 随着主机成本上涨、销量预计大幅下滑，新游戏全面数字化能让索尼从每笔销售中赚到更多。以《最后生还者》这样的PlayStation第一方游戏为例，实体版收入中索尼只能留下约65%，约30%归零售商，另有约5%用于生产。至于动视发行的《使命召唤》等第三方游戏实体版，索尼获得的授权费可能只有约为15%。

paragraphs.en: For downloads, however, the margins are much higher. For a first-party game sold via Sony's own PlayStation Store, the company obviously keeps 100% of the revenue. For third-party games such as Call of Duty, meanwhile, Sony keeps a 30% cut (so, roughly $21 for a $70 game).
paragraphs.cn: 数字下载的利润率则高得多。第一方游戏通过索尼自有的PlayStation Store销售时，公司显然能保留100%的收入；对于《使命召唤》等第三方游戏，索尼可抽成30%，也就是一款70美元(约合人民币474元)的游戏能为其带来约21美元(约合人民币142元)的收入。

paragraphs.en: Piers Harding-Rolls, games industry analyst at Ampere, has said the data backs this up, and that a lot has changed over the course of the last two generations. "Console gaming is the last hold-out for physical media in the gaming sector, but physical product has been declining in importance," he said in a post on the Ampere website . "Back in 2013 when the PS4 launched, Ampere data shows that only 13% of total full games unit sales for Sony consoles were digital (including digital-only games). Fast forward to 2025, and this digital share of full game purchases stood at almost 80% of the total.
paragraphs.cn: Ampere分析师Piers Harding-Rolls称数据印证了这一点，过去两代主机间发生了巨大变化。他表示：「主机游戏是游戏业实体媒介最后的堡垒，但实体产品的重要性持续下降。2013年PS4推出时，索尼主机完整游戏销量中仅13%为数字版；到2025年，数字购买占比已接近80%。」

paragraphs.en: "Inevitably there will be concerns from PlayStation gamers around various aspects of this announcement including choice, accessing older physical games on new consoles, the ability to collect physical games, and game preservation, however the purchasing trends of gamers are clear."
paragraphs.cn: 他表示：「PlayStation玩家必然担忧选择权、在新主机读取旧实体游戏、收藏实体游戏以及游戏保存等问题，但玩家的购买趋势非常明确。」

paragraphs.en: One analyst said fans of physical media had their chance and blew it, so there’s no going back. “If gamers and preservationists had bought more physical games, Sony wouldn’t have seen the digital sales ratios that justify this decision,” Robin Zhu, a games analyst at Bernstein, told the Financial Times .
paragraphs.cn: 一名分析师表示，实体媒体粉丝曾经有机会却错过了，因此已经没有回头路。Bernstein游戏分析师Robin Zhu告诉《金融时报》：「如果玩家和保存主义者当初购买更多实体游戏，索尼就不会看到足以证明这一决定合理的数字销售比例。」

paragraphs.en: “Digital game sales carry essentially 100% incremental margin... the cost of the physical package, shipping and retailer margins can be more than 20% per cent of sticker price.”
paragraphs.cn: 「数字游戏销售基本拥有100%的增量利润……实体包装、运输和零售商利润的成本，可能超过标价的20%。」
